name: Mrs Fields Lemon Poppy Seed Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300-degrees F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking powder, freshly grated lemon zest, ground coriander, and poppy seeds. Mix well with a wire whisk and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, cream butter and sugar with an electric mixer at medium speed until the mixture forms a grainy paste. Scrape down the sides of the bowl.
4. Add yolks, egg, and lemon extract to the butter mixture. Beat at medium speed until light and fluffy.
5. Gradually add the flour mixture to the butter mixture and mix at low speed just until combined. Do not overmix.
6. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto ungreased cookie sheets, 2 inches apart.
7. Bake for 23-25 minutes, or until cookies are slightly brown along the edges.
8. Immediately transfer cookies with a spatula to a cool surface.
